name: Bombabarbardeer
description: A Bandit multi-barrel rocket launcher that fires a three-rocket spread for the cost of a single round. It behaves more like an explosive shotgun than a precision launcher, with a generous magazine, light damage per rocket, and slow reloads. It performs best at close to medium range, where all three rockets can land on large targets or clustered enemies.
notes: It can appear as a standard world drop from suitable loot sources.
